description: Product Description Previous page Soft lining for warmth and comfort. The waterproof upper material keeps out snow,water The non-slip, soft sole protects your every step. Next page 1 Warm 2 Waterproof 3 Non-slip Wide Range of Uses Knixmax Outdoor Winter Boots provide plenty of warmth when you're out playing in the snow working on dog walks and other outdoor sports, and the uppers are waterproof to keep your feet dry and comfortable. Are the boots comfortable to wear? Knixmax Outdoor winter boots are lined with fleece to provide warmth while achieving good comfort. Are the boots waterproof? The upper of the Knixmax Outdoor winter boots is made of waterproof material, which makes them waterproof. Does the boot size fit? Users can choose the right size of winter boots according to the size chart. However, since everyone's feet are unique, when you receive boots that do not fit, we will provide you with an exchange service, and strive to make you satisfied.
